info.title: Dealer Location Update API
info.description:
Updates the **responsible dealership** associated with a specific machine. The legacy SOAP **Dealer Machine Location Update** operation maps to this REST API; see your SOAP-to-REST field mapping and FAQ attachments for property-level details.

Support: Warranty_Api_Support@JohnDeere.com

servers.description: Sandbox (cert). Production uses `https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com` — confirm the path segment (for example whether `cert` is present) with your integration guide.

OAuth2.description: John Deere Dealer Solutions OAuth 2.0. Use the **authorization code** flow (three-legged) for interactive users, or the **client credentials** grant for machine-to-machine access. Request the OAuth scope assigned to your application for this API (this reference uses `warranty` as an example — confirm the scope in your Developer.Deere.com application and technical documentation).

DealerLocationUpdateRequest.description: Payload to add a **DealerLocnDetails** entity. Include **at least one** valid field that the service accepts (see SOAP-to-REST field mapping). Additional properties may be returned or accepted per the underlying OData contract.

machineSerialNumber.description: Machine serial number or identifier for the equipment whose responsible dealership is being updated.

responsibleDealerCode.description: John Deere dealer code for the dealership that should be responsible for the machine.

effectiveDate.description: Effective date for the location change, when applicable to your mapping.

DealerLocationUpdateResponse.description: Acknowledgement or created entity payload from the DealerLocnDetails set.

machineSerialNumber.description: Machine serial number that was updated.

responsibleDealerCode.description: Responsible dealer code after the update.

effectiveDate.description: Effective date when returned by the service.

status.description: Processing or entity status when returned by the service.

message.example: The request body must include at least one valid field.

post.summary: Add dealer location details for a machine
post.description:
Creates a new **DealerLocnDetails** entity in **DealerLocnDetailsSet**, updating the responsible dealership for a machine. The request body must contain **at least one** valid field.

**Sandbox example:** `POST https://jdws-api-sandbox.deere.com/digcust/wy/cert/WtyDbsDealerLocnUpd/DealerLocnDetailsSet`

**Production:** Use the production host with the path pattern documented for your environment (path may omit the `cert` segment compared to sandbox).

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Application or service instance segment for your Dealer Solutions integration (for example `WtyDbsDealerLocnUpd` in sandbox).

200.description: Update accepted; response body may include the updated entity or acknowledgement.

204.description: Update accepted with no response body.

400.description: Bad request — empty body, no valid fields, or validation failure.

error.message: The request body must include at least one valid field.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid access token.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not include the required scope or organization access.

error.message: Access token is missing the required scope.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
